3121890.name: Erased
3121890.description:
Erased gives you true freedom. It is an action-packed psychological adventure set in a post-apocalyptic urban-cyberpunk world. You are not forced to choose between styles of gameplay. It merges open-world exploration with fast, skill-based combat built with fighting-game precision, a combination rarely seen in games. Roller blade, rail grind, parkour, and interact with pets as you roam a living world shaped by dark, dream-based lore. Your memories have been erased, and uncovering the truth drives your journey. Play completely solo offline or challenge others in online PVP.

The game offers deep character customization with authentic, culturally inspired hairstyles, especially for minority characters, giving players a wide range of stylish, realistic options. Erased also embraces true dance culture, featuring high-energy dance battles with hip hop, Afro-beats, and K-pop. Clothing, moves, and battles reflect genuine street culture, letting you express yourself through dance, not just emotes.

By combining fighting-game combat with open-world freedom, rich story, and vibrant exploration, Erased creates a hybrid experience that breaks the usual rules of gaming, giving players total freedom to master combos, explore, and shape their journey through a living, dynamic world.

Features: Parkour, Roller Blading, Offline PvP, Online PvP, Character Customization, Single Player Story Mode, Karma System, Pets, Dance Battles, Graffiti, Concerts

Parkour & Roller Blading

Move through the world with unmatched freedom. Master parkour to scale buildings, vault obstacles, and flow across the city. Glide with roller blades or ride hoverboards and bikes for fast traversal. Perform tricks and rail grind to chain together combos, making movement an exhilarating part of gameplay. All animations are created with advanced motion capture technology, making every move fluid and realistic.

Combat System

Experience combat like a true fighting game with fast, precise moves, combos, and skill-based mechanics normally seen in one-on-one fighters. What makes Erased revolutionary is that all of this happens in a fully open world, letting you fight while exploring, climbing, and moving freely. The fluid combat system is built with advanced motion capture technology and includes dynamic blocking and dodging, making every encounter cinematic, reactive, and skill-driven. Step into online PvP or challenge yourself in offline PvP and participate in live tournaments to test your mastery in a living, interactive world.

Character Customization

Make your character truly yours. Shape every detail with deep slider-based customization for facial features, skin tones, and body types. Choose from a massive range of funky hair styles including unique ethnic and diverse hairstyles. Combine these with bold cyberpunk styled fashion to create a character that feels powerful, stylish, and completely original

Single Player Story Mode

Dive into an emotional, dream-based story line that challenges perception and uncovers a lost past. Every choice you make affects the karma system and alters the story, but the correct path is never clear. Face giant dynamic boss battles and command forces in large scale war battles, making each moment feel epic and alive. The world is dark and mysterious and follows strange rules whispered through lore: "Walk backwards at night, sleep during the day, and never EVER dream."

Pets

Companions are more than cute additions. Pets carry shops on their backs, bringing items to you wherever you go. They build bonds over time and act as loyal mounts for faster travel. Pets evolve and learn unique skills based on how you raise them. Your pet can develop abilities no other pet will learn, and with the right bond, they can perform incredible and unexpected feats. Pets grow with you, creating a deeply personal relationship that impacts gameplay.

Dance, Music & Art

Immerse yourself in living street culture. Experience Hip Hop, Afro-beats, and K-pop culture through concerts, authentic dance battles, and urban artistry like graffiti. These are not just emotes or canned animations. The dance battles are high-energy, showing what it feels like to be hyped up by a crowd, stick your tongue out, and feel the life of music pulsing through the world. All movement and dance animations are motion-captured, making every performance fluid and realistic. Music and movement are more than decoration; they shape gameplay, style, and expression in the world.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
